calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Suzanne Day in Propria Persona.

Ms. Day explained why she waited 30-years to file this petition, spoke of the investigation and steps she took to find answers, and stated that she recently became aware of an insurance policy she is entitled to. The Court raised the issue of whether the incident took place on the San Francisco side of the bridge or the Sausalito side. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
